name: src
description: MCP server for 3D scene generation for web and ads.

scripts.prebuild: npm run check:types && npm run check:mcp && npm run test:health
scripts.dev: nodemon --watch src --ext ts --exec "npm run build:fast && node dist/server.js"
scripts.dev:http: MCP_TRANSPORT=http nodemon --watch src --ext ts --exec "npm run build:fast && node dist/server.js"
scripts.health: npm run check:types && npm run check:mcp && npm run test:health
